で、本当に娼館で働く気なのか？: So, are you really planning to work at the brothel?
研修は終わったが、あらためて彼女の意向を訊いてみる。<br>人手不足は否めないの:
The training ended, so I asked her about her intentions again. We
were short-staffed, but I wouldn't force her.
あの～、研修だけでこれだけの金貨が頂けるのなら、 <br>その……研修だけ何度も:
Um, if I can get this many gold coins just from the training... you
know... couldn't I just do the training multiple times...?
は！？<br>いやいやいや！ 研修は１回だけだ！: Huh! No, no, no! The training is only once!
そりゃそうですよね～、あははぁ～！: Yeah, I figured you'd say that, Ahaha!
さすがに研修だけで稼がせるわけにはいかない。<br>マリナは素直に諦め、明るく笑:
I couldn't very well let her earn money from just training. Marina gave
in gracefully, laughed brightly, and shrugged her shoulders.
上手くできるかどうかも不安ですしぃ、<br>もう少しゆっくり考えてみますね～。:
I'm not sure if I can do it well or not, so I'll take a little more time to
think about it, okay?
ああ、時間がかかってもいい。<br>ちゃんと考えてから答えを出してくれればそれで:
Yeah, it's fine if it takes time. As long as you think it through
properly and give me your answer, that's fine.
そうですよね。やっぱり、まだまだ自信ないですし……: You're right. I guess I really don't have much confidence yet...
そこで１つ提案なのですがぁ～、<br>わたしの自信がつくまで何度か研修してもらう:
So, I have a proposal... Couldn't you give me a few more training
sessions until I build up my confidence...?
いやいや、だから研修は１回だけだって言っただろ？: No, no, I told you, the training is only once, right?
いえいえいえっ！ そこを何とか！<br>もちろん、お金はなしでもいいのでぇ～！:
No, no, no! Please, I'm begging you! Of course, I'd be happy to do it
for free!
そう言ってしつこくおねだりをし続けるマリナ。<br>どうやら、初めての体験がよっ:
Saying that, Marina continued to wheedle persistently. It seemed she
had really taken a liking to her first experience.
そこをもう一声！ もうちょっとでコツが掴めそうな気がするんですよね～<br>わた:
Come on, just one more! I feel like I'm almost getting the hang of it!
Whether I can do a good job or not is all up to you, Honey!
いやいや、そう言われてもなぁ～……: No, no... even when you say that...
商人モードの入ったマリナの交渉には叶うわけもなく、<br>結局、それから数回に渡:
I couldn't compete with Marina's merchant-mode negotiation, so I
ended up giving her several more 'training' sessions.
